## Engineering Check-list
- [ ] My code follows the repository's modular folder structure (`src/`, `configs/`, etc.)
- [ ] I have not hardcoded hyperparameters (they are defined inside YAML or argument parsers)
- [ ] I have added/modified unit tests in the `tests/` directory to cover my changes
- [ ] (If applicable) I have provided a link/screenshot to the verified Weights & Biases training logs
